title: Charred Bakalar with Croatian Melon Salad
description: A refreshing summer dish featuring charred Croatian-style dried fish, paired with a sweet and tangy melon salad. This light and easy recipe is perfect for warm weather.

ingredients.name: Melon
ingredients.notes: any sweet variety such as Galia or Cantaloupe

instructions: Season bakalar with salt and pepper.
Grill bakalar for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Meanwhile, combine diced melon, sliced red onion, and chopped fresh dill in a bowl.
Squeeze lemon juice over the melon mixture and stir to combine.
Drizzle with olive oil, if using.
Serve grilled bakalar alongside the melon salad.
